title: cynanchum viminale subsp. mulanjense
intro: Cynanchum viminale subsp. mulanjense, also known as Mulanje rope, is a species of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, native to Malawi. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to induce sweating and reduce fever. The health benefits of Cynanchum viminale subsp. mulanjense include its potential to treat malaria, as well as its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of various infections and diseases. The plant can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine in Africa to treat various health conditions.
